title: Boxue validation - light-quark Higgs couplings
domain: High energy physics / Higgs couplings to up and down quarks
objective: Validate Boxue orchestration from literature evidence to gap ranking to hypothesis generation for up-quark and down-quark Higgs Yukawa couplings
strategic_need: AI for Science and precision Higgs physics

boxue_delegation_plans.goal: Search literature, organize knowledge gaps, and generate hypotheses about up/down quark Higgs couplings

comparison.prompt_assign_task: implemented as persistent create_task DAG entries with assigned agent, phase, dependency, deliverable, priority, and acceptance criteria
comparison.prompt_review_output: implemented as reviewer_gate plus boxue_final dependency gates; Boxue can add revision tasks via the task system
comparison.prompt_synthesize: implemented as bianlun_synthesis, paperwriter_draft, and boxue_final synthesis tasks
comparison.prompt_adjust_plan: implemented operationally by creating additional tasks or new delegation plans after reviewing outputs
comparison.prompt_finalize: implemented as boxue_final decision task, not as specialist execution

stronger_than_old_pipeline_tasks: role-specific tasks instead of generic phase tasks
risk constraints embedded in every task
optional teammate spawning for unblocked specialist work
prompt_alignment.remaining_manual_gate: Boxue still needs to review outputs and decide whether to create revision tasks; this preserves human/lead control over shared project state.

coordination_policy.boxue_role: decompose, assign, review, synthesize, adjust, finalize
coordination_policy.specialist_role: execute only the assigned scientific subtask
coordination_policy.shared_state: state-changing PaperGraph/project updates should be gated by lead/synthesis tasks

tasks.title: Build grounded PaperGraph evidence substrate
acceptance_criteria: At least one verifiable source or an explicit retrieval-failure report
Method/scenario/benchmark/contribution/limitation fields are populated or flagged unknown
Unsupported claims are marked for human review

tasks.title: Rank high-value knowledge gaps
acceptance_criteria: Every reported gap has supporting references or is flagged as ungrounded

tasks.title: Generate and evolve gap-grounded hypotheses
acceptance_criteria: Each hypothesis links to a gap_id
Each hypothesis contains mechanism and falsification condition

boxue_delegation_plans.next_step: Let unblocked specialist tasks run first. Boxue should review outputs at dependency gates, then adjust or unlock downstream phases.
